hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(pixi\.lock|__pycache__|device_svg_files/|redis_settings\.json|\.pixi/)' && echo 'BLOCK: Generated or locked file' && exit 1 || exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_COMMAND" | grep -qE 'git (checkout|reset|submodule).*(microdrop-py/src|src/)' && echo 'BLOCK: Do not modify submodule pointer directly' && exit 1 || exit 0

[ "$CLAUDE_AUTO_PYTEST" = "1" ] || exit 0; filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$filepath" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then basename=$(basename "$filepath" .py); testfile=$(find C:/Users/Info/PycharmProjects/pixi-microdrop/microdrop-py/src/examples/tests -name "test_*${basename}*" 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$testfile" ]; then cd C:/Users/Info/PycharmProjects/pixi-microdrop/microdrop-py && pixi run pytest "$testfile" -x -q 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; fi

powershell -Command "[System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadWithPartialName('System.Windows.Forms') | Out-Null; [System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('Claude needs permission','Claude Code','OK','Information') | Out-Null" 2>/dev/null &

powershell -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $n=New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $n.Icon=[System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $n.Visible=$true; $n.ShowBalloonTip(5000,'Claude Code','Claude is waiting for input','Info')" 2>/dev/null &
